PowerShell(node -e "const r=require\('./scripts/audit-results.json'\); console.log\('total:',r.length\); console.log\('confirmed:',r.filter\(x=>x.status==='CONFIRMED'\).length\); console.log\('mismatch:',r.filter\(x=>x.status==='MISMATCH'\).length\); console.log\('uncertain:',r.filter\(x=>x.status==='UNCERTAIN'\).length\); console.log\('invalid:',r.filter\(x=>!['CONFIRMED','MISMATCH','UNCERTAIN'].includes\(x.status\)\).length\); const ids=r.map\(x=>x.id\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>a-b\); console.log\('min id:',ids[0],'max id:',ids[ids.length-1]\); console.log\('ids count:',ids.length\);" 2>&1)
